responses: Hello! Welcome to College Assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi there! Ask me anything about our college.
Admissions open in May each year. Last date is July 31st. Apply online at our college website.
You need 50% minimum in 12th grade. The application fee is ₹500.
We offer B.Tech (CS, IT, ECE, Mechanical), BCA, MCA, BBA, MBA, and B.Sc programs.
Popular courses: B.Tech CSE (120 seats), BCA (60 seats), MBA (60 seats).
Scholarships available for merit students (10-25% fee waiver).
Odd semester: July-Nov. Even semester: Dec-April. Exams in May and December.
Diwali break (Oct/Nov), Winter break (Dec 25-Jan 1), Summer break (May-June).
We have a digital library open 8 AM-10 PM, 3 canteens, sports complex, and separate boys/girls hostels.
WiFi campus, smart classrooms, and 24/7 medical room available.
Average placement: 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters: TCS, Infosys, Amazon, Wipro, Accenture.
90% of eligible students placed last year. Highest package: 24 LPA (Amazon).
Campus: College Road, Civil Lines, Delhi-110054
You're welcome! Come back if you have more questions.
Happy to help! Good luck with your college journey!
